mcqs.question: Which of the following is listed as a Structured Query Language Command type?
Which SQL Join type matches each tuple in one table to all the tuples in the other table without any conditions?
Which aggregate function returns the total value of a column in a database table?
A Subquery, Inner query, or Nested query is incorporated into which clause of another SQL query?
What is a characteristic of a Correlated Nested Query?
options: It automatically matches similar column names.
It returns a single value after a calculation on multiple values.
It reads every row in a table and compares values in each row against related data.
It joins tables by matching given columns with all tuples in the left-hand side.
mcqs.answer: It reads every row in a table and compares values in each row against related data.
